elements.title: lang::report_page_056_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT DISTINCT kbi_gi.itemname                                                 AS activity_name,
                kbi_g.userid,
                kbi_u.username,
                kbi_u.firstname,
                kbi_u.lastname,
                kbi_c.fullname,
                kbi_cc1.name                                                    AS course_category,
                kbi_c.shortname,
                tcrs.teachers                                               as courseteachers,
                kbi_g.timemodified                                              AS graduated,
                ROUND((CASE
                         WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                         ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0)                         AS grade,
                ROUND((CASE
                         WHEN (kbi_g.rawgrademax - kbi_g.rawgrademin) > 0
                                 THEN ((kbi_g.finalgrade - kbi_g.rawgrademin) / (kbi_g.rawgrademax - kbi_g.rawgrademin)) * 100
                         ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0)                         AS grade_percent,
                kbi_wg.firstname                                                AS who_graded_first_name,
                kbi_wg.lastname                                                 AS who_graded_last_name,
                kbi_gi.itemtype,
                CASE WHEN kbi_m.name = 'assign' THEN kbi_sg.timemodified ELSE 0 END AS need_grade_assignment,
                kbi_ul.timeaccess                                               AS course_lastaccess
FROM mdl_course kbi_c
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_categories kbi_cc1 ON kbi_cc1.id = kbi_c.category
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cx.instanceid, GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(kbi_u.firstname, ' ', kbi_u.lastname) SEPARATOR ', ') as teachers
                  FROM mdl_context kbi_cx
                         JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_cx.id AND
                                                         kbi_ra.roleid IN (1, 2, 3, 4)
                         JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
                  WHERE kbi_cx.contextlevel = 50
                  GROUP BY kbi_cx.instanceid) tcrs ON tcrs.instanceid = kbi_c.id
       JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50
       JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra ON kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_ctx.id
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ra.userid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_c.id AND (kbi_gi.itemtype = 'mod' OR kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course')
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_gi.id = kbi_g.itemid AND kbi_g.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user kbi_wg ON kbi_wg.id = kbi_g.usermodified
       LEFT JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.name = kbi_gi.itemmodule
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules kbi_cm ON kbi_cm.instance = kbi_gi.iteminstance AND kbi_cm.module = kbi_m.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc ON kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id AND kbi_cmc.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_submission kbi_ass ON kbi_ass.userid = kbi_u.id AND kbi_ass.assignment = kbi_cm.instance AND
                                              kbi_ass.status = 'submitted' AND kbi_ass.latest = 1
       LEFT JOIN mdl_assign_grades kbi_sg ON kbi_ass.assignment = kbi_sg.assignment AND kbi_ass.userid = kbi_sg.userid AND
                                         kbi_sg.attemptnumber = kbi_ass.attemptnumber AND
                                         (kbi_ass.timemodified >= kbi_sg.timemodified OR kbi_sg.timemodified IS NULL OR
                                          kbi_sg.grade IS NULL)
       LEFT JOIN mdl_user_lastaccess kbi_ul ON kbi_ul.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_ul.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE kbi_c.id > 0
  AND kbi_c.id = :courseid
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
ORDER BY kbi_c.fullname, kbi_gi.itemname, kbi_u.lastname, kbi_u.firstname
